titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Suwayd
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Suwayd

segments: ه عن عليّ بن سويد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن عليّ بن الحكم، عن عليّ بن سويد.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن سويد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن عليّ بن الحكم، عن عليّ بن سويد.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Suwayd has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam, from Ali ibn Suwayd.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Suwayd has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ali ibn Al-Hakam, from Ali ibn Suwayd.
